compiled_state.title: Sub-agent test setup can pollute main repo git state via git init in CWD
compiled_state.author: Test

comments.body: Classification: behavioral, Score: 1 (BASIC). Test code likely runs git init without using a temporary directory, polluting the main repo's git state.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: Investigation: BASIC tier found no actual violation. All 65+ git init calls in tests/ are properly isolated (explicit dir arg, subshell+cd, or forked subprocess). no-real-git-state.sh isolation rule reports zero violations. Bug appears stale or pre-fixed.
comments.author: Test
